flashcards.front: Name two ML applications in healthcare.
flashcards.back: Disease diagnosis from medical images (CNN) and drug discovery (regression/clustering).

flashcards.front: Which ML technique is used for fraud detection?
flashcards.back: Anomaly detection and classification — the model learns patterns of normal transactions and flags deviations.

flashcards.front: What ML technique powers recommendation systems?
flashcards.back: Collaborative filtering (user-item similarity) and deep learning models.

flashcards.front: Which ML type is best for autonomous vehicles?
flashcards.back: Deep learning (CNN for perception) combined with reinforcement learning (for decision-making and control).
Using time-series ML models to forecast equipment failures before they occur, reducing downtime and repair costs.

flashcards.front: Name three NLP applications of ML.
flashcards.back: Chatbots/virtual assistants, machine translation (Google Translate), and sentiment analysis of reviews.
